subject: [COMMON] Templates for services accounts and roles
commit_message:
[COMMON] Templates for services accounts and roles

Create a common chart that will create the relevant service accounts /
roles and role binding for ONAP components.

Issue-ID: OOM-1971
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I687ef6debe679b5f7f250d75d93ee4da84d97104

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 2 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/4937/

Patch Set 1:

Here, I've tried to create 3 classes of accounts:
* read only (for those who needs "ready containers")
* create (for pre/post upgrade hooks)
* nothing (the others)

I tried to be as much restrictive as possible, so please review carefully, knowing that for create I've based the rules with https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/105636 and https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/106511.

Obviously we'll update them later when we'll really use them but I wanted to have a kind of base for discussion.

@Tri, @Krzysztof, @Amy, don't hesitate to comment!
